account_disabled: Your account has been disabled. Contact support for more information.
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
email_already_exists: An account already exists with this email address.
email_linked_oauth: An account already exists with this email address via {provider}. Please log in using that method.
oauth_login_required: This account uses {provider} login. Please use that login method.
profile_already_completed: Your profile has already been completed.
cannot_change_password: Cannot change the password for this account type.
cannot_create_admin: This account type cannot be created this way.
missing_pro_fields: First name and last name are required for a professional account.
missing_pro_country: Please select at least one country.
invalid_country: One or more country codes are invalid.
country_not_available: None of the selected countries are available.
oauth_failed: Login via {provider} failed. Please try again.
oauth_code_missing: Missing login parameter. Please try again.
unsupported_provider: This login method is not supported.
token_login_unsupported: Token login is not supported for this provider.
email_not_provided: Your login provider did not share your email address. Please use a different login method.
token_verification_failed: Token verification failed. Please try again.
verification_code_sent: A verification code has been sent.
verification_code_invalid: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
password_reset_sent: A reset link has been sent to your email address.
